chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-4477 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge Priority 1. For hearing on Misc. No.19769/2024 2. For hearing of main case 07-02-2025 Mr. Haider Waheed Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Asad Aftab Advocate for the Respondent Mr. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Per learned counsel show cause notice in this matter is pending, however, the petitioner shall contest the same before the issuing authority and it may be just and proper that no coercive action to be taken against the Petitioner pending adjudication of the same. Learned counsel for the department articulated no cavil in this regard and states that the petition may be disposed of in aforesaid terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad PS
